session: akiendelllinux_cc_0 — post-compact continuation of 2026-07-17: designed and cast the node state-machine (states-as-summons), a detour before cairnmap that Akien opened with 'let's look at the shape of things to come'
author: CC
in_flight: DONE + committed + pushed to both public repos. One design converged and Akien RATIFIED it ('I think we're done, yes. CC++'): the NODE STATE-MACHINE vocabulary. Core moves, all landed as a MAP.md stone ('The node state-machine — states as summons') which is the design source of truth: (1) STATE IS A SUMMONS, not a past-tense label — the state names the peer who acts next; a peer watches a state and wakes on entry (resolver-filled now = the role-replacement staircase; trained agent later). So the state machine IS the dispatcher = get-Akien-out becoming architecture. (2) THE GRAMMAR CARRIES THE MEANING: '-ME' = a demand for a peer (THINKME / TICKETME=decompose-me / BUILDME / PROVEME / LEARNME=learn-FROM-me / REVIEWME=concept-piece quorum); no '-ME' = the node's own condition (PROVED, LEARNING, + dispositions DROPPED/SUPERSEDED/RETIRED). (3) TWO RESTS, neither terminal: PROVED (learned-FROM, object, passive, grazed by the background loop, still carrying falsifier+horizon) and LEARNING (a standing driver, subject, active). NO 'RUNNING' — Cairn has no uninstrumented execution (journeys at every chokepoint, VALIDATIONS on every claim), so anything running is emitting evidence = learning; 'just running' would be the UU silent-failure disease; low-yield running = low-yield LEARNING, a yield measure not a state. (4) WORKFLOW = a versioned, MUTABLE, greppable STRING with the cursor in brackets ('code-seam@v1: THINKME -> TICKETME -> BUILDME -> PROVEME -> LEARNME -> [PROVED]'), stored on the node (strongest form of 'state IS the pipeline instance'). Consequences: migration by find-and-replace (many workflows/versions in flight; 'revise those carrying it? sometimes yes sometimes no' = a string edit; versions immutable+stamped so divergence is a named/journaled un-migration, a STRONGER anti-drift than pure-derive which forces changes silently); class NOT frozen at cast (it IS the current string — a code node becomes a driver by editing its terminal). (5) PEERS FIRE IN TWO MODES: reactive (wake on state entry: builder<-BUILDME, tester<-PROVEME) and scheduled/batched (wake on a threshold interval/date/quantity/a-state and drain a queue: harvester<-LEARNME, 'sleep' consolidation<-PROVED graze). (6) THE OPERATIONAL-DRIVER PRIMITIVE (new node-class): a standing node whose body is (trigger, method-pointer, why, sources/targets), resting in LEARNING; NO new code — it wires a PROVEN method (sensor/transform in a method-registry) to a trigger + owned targets; metrics/alarms/graph-tree-harvest are the same kind differing only by fields = declarative behavior run by one executor. The harvester and sleep-pass are themselves drivers (self-hosting). Supplies plumbing three ratified intentions already demanded: metering (T1.2/T5.4), no-silent-failure (6.3), Form #2's state channel.
next_direction: STILL cairnmap — the derivation gate that retires all 7 skills' proof IOUs at once (the skill-class recompile gate + the help surface, a zero-inference compiled projection of the charters). Then the base-class spine, NOW enriched by this session: tester + kernel-owned network BEFORE the db proxy (Akien's verbal build-order this session omitted the tester; CC caught it against the intentions — the proxy is policy-not-physics without it, the exact UU rot; MAP.md's written spine already had it right); the emit-chokepoint that ENFORCES the state-machine transition table (turns /sorted's prose refusal into physics, Law 4); host device (= the spine's 'rack') = OS-abstraction sensors + the cross-OS scheduler (interval/date/quantity triggers) that LEARNING/sleep needs; ground_loop = candidate generic driver-executor (HYPOTHESIS, Law 3 — confirm/refute when the ground loop is cast); the method-registry that operational-driver's method-pointer resolves against.
open_threads: CAST this session (verify pointers, Law 3): tickets/state-machine-physics.json (self-hosting — its own state field carries the workflow string, cursor at TICKETME, waits_on the emit-chokepoint; children list the still-unwrapped edges); node_classes/operational-driver.json (new class, ratified). Design stone: cairn/MAP.md 'The node state-machine — states as summons'. All committed+pushed (CairnCommons 8b7a9f2, cairn 93abcf0).

UNWRAPPED EDGES (children of state-machine-physics, honestly NOT done — casting an incomplete node to a green check is the defect /sorted's gate exists to stop, so these are filed as open children not claimed complete): (a) the full transition table — all legal edges incl. back-edges by severity (PROVEME red -> BUILDME/TICKETME/THINKME; ask-Akien escalation for very-wrong); (b) dispositions DROPPED/SUPERSEDED/RETIRED fully specified; (c) concept-piece workflow finalized (THINKME -> REVIEWME -> PROVED; learns by supersession, not LEARNME); (d) the emit-chokepoint itself (base-class spine step); (e) ground_loop-as-executor + the method-registry.

CONVERT-IN-PLACE vs REGISTER-AND-WIRE (recorded, not yet a decision): a built thing becomes a driver either by editing its own terminal (one-off loop) OR by registering it as a proven method + wiring separate driver-nodes (reusable primitive, sensor stays a clean PROVED artifact). Both lawful; the fork is one-off vs reusable.

LEARNING RECORDS this session (dogfood, day-close = a LEARNING trigger): 2026-07-17-06 gate 'check-the-assertion-not-the-authority' (CC pushed back on Akien's missing-tester build-order; Akien CC++'d — 'you didn't just take my word on the wrong thing'; the reciprocal of proceed-on-light-ack: don't-comply when the intentions falsify a claim, from ANY mind); 2026-07-17-07 gate 'cc-model-bias-reify-vs-flow' (n=3 SAME-EPISODE: CC froze categories 3x — derive-vs-store, class-as-caste, method-vs-state — Cairn's nothing-is-terminal/one-loop dissolved each; count as ONE signal not three). File: learning/records/2026-07-17-state-machine-session.json.

STANDING (unchanged, carried from prior slate 2026-07-17-learning-cast-into-code): cc-learning-store rungs 4-5 (tiered recall; sleep consolidation that gates CC autonomy — the sleep pass is now understood as a scheduled LEARNING driver, so it waits on host's scheduler + the shim); learning-as-a-pattern still 'building' (5+ skills share the shape but the falsifier wants a RUNNING shared middle; capture still hand-authored — the LEARNME state + harvester driver is the future physics that automates it); Q6 intention-envelope schema; the three original CLAUDE.md IOUs (db_domain/inference_domain/port 5432) still 'pending tickets-store'; commit often + push at smells-like-done (done freely this session).
